Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The AttachmentStoreBehavior enumeration specifies whether final attachment contents must be preserved after a render pass completes.

Note.Paragraph: Selecting UndefinedFinalData means later render passes, output capture, texture sampling, and presentation must not depend on the attachment contents produced by this pass.

EnumMemberList.EnumMemberListEntry: Requires the renderer to preserve the final attachment contents after the render pass completes, making them available for later passes, presentation, capture, or resource reads.
Allows the renderer to discard the final attachment contents when the pass completes. This can be more efficient for transient attachments whose contents are not needed later.
